name: python3-requests-oauthlib
title: python3-requests-oauthlib
summary: module providing OAuthlib auth support for requests (Python 3)
description:
module providing OAuthlib auth support for requests (Python 3)
requests-oauthlib allows you to interact with OAuth 1 And OAuth 2 in
greatly simplified ways through the requests library for Python. It
will hide the quirks and hacks in OAuth 1, and will interface with
all four of the grant types defined by the OAuth2 RFC.
.
This package provides the requests-oauthlib Python module for Python
3.x.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-requests-oauthlib because module providing OAuthlib auth support for requests (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-requests-oauthlib as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-requests-oauthlib with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-requests-oauthlib --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
